ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the race took place */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the race occurred */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the race */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in meters */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track during the race */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., turf, synthetic) */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track (e.g., grass, dirt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse (e.g., male, female) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse (e.g., bay, chestnut) */,
  "sire" TEXT /* Sire of the horse */,
  "dam" TEXT /* Dam of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horse_racing_history" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "start_pos" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "finish_pos" TEXT /* Final position of the horse in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the horse to finish the race */,
  "odds" TEXT /* Odds of the horse winning the race */,
  "winnings" REAL /* Winnings from the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id", "race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the trainer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trainer */,
  "license_num" TEXT /* License number of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the jockey */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the jockey */,
  "license_num" TEXT /* License number of the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horse_owners" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horse_trainers" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  "training_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the horse started training with the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id", "trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jockey */,
  "start_pos" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "finish_pos" TEXT /* Final position of the horse in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the horse to finish the race */,
  "odds" TEXT /* Odds of the horse winning the race */,
  "winnings" REAL /* Winnings from the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id", "horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "medical_issue" TEXT /* Description of the medical issue */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the medical issue was diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided for the medical issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id", "medical_issue")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_history" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the horse was trained */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., galloping, jumping) */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id", "trainer_id", "training_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., speed, endurance) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id", "metric_name", "metric_date")
)
